data.title: Synopsys gets final approval to divest Optical Solutions Group and PowerArtist businesses to Keysight.
data.description: In Sunnyvale, California on October 10, 2025, Synopsys, Inc. (Nasdaq: SNPS) revealed that all required approvals have been secured for the intended divestitures of the Optical Solutions Group and PowerArtist businesses to Keysight.

data.title: Bluehost opens new data centers for low-latency hosting worldwide, aiming to offer high-performing, cost-effective solutions.
data.description: Bluehost, a global hosting leader with expertise in web and commerce, has introduced Localized Hosting aimed at helping Growing Brands offer top-notch, Conversion-Ready Experiences without the complexity or cost associated with enterprise solutions. This initiative was launched on October 10, 2025, in Jacksonville, Florida.

data.title: BWH® Hotels showcase growth and innovation at convention, aiming to be the world's most welcoming brand.
data.description: On October 10, 2025, BWH Hotels, a prominent hospitality organization consisting of three hotel firms, commemorated its swift worldwide growth and establishment of new partnerships. This event marks the beginning of the company's journey towards attaining the status of the most hospitable brand globally.

data.title: Shareholders of PubMatic, Inc. urged to contact Levi & Korsinsky by Oct 20, 2025 regarding class action lawsuit - PUBM.
data.description: On October 10, 2025, Levi & Korsinsky, LLP announced a class action securities lawsuit for investors in PubMatic, Inc. (NASDAQ: PUBM). The lawsuit aims to assist investors who suffered losses in PubMatic, Inc. due to alleged securities violations. The legal action provides a platform for affected investors to potentially recover their losses.

data.title: Shareholders of Fluor Corp. urged to contact Levi & Korsinsky by Nov. 14, 2025 for lawsuit; Class action securities lawsuit for recovery on behalf of FLR investors.
data.description: On October 10, 2025, Levi & Korsinsky, LLP issued a notification to investors invested in Fluor Corporation (NYSE: FLR) regarding a class action securities lawsuit. The lawsuit aims to recover losses for investors of Fluor Corporation. The class definition includes all Fluor Corporation investors who have incurred losses due to the alleged misconduct.

data.title: Blue Ocean Technologies to integrate with tokenized NMS US Equities Trading, solidifying its position in global market.
data.description: A fintech leader in global trading and data, Blue Ocean Technologies, LLC, disclosed on Oct. 10, 2025, its plan to integrate with the upcoming tokenized National Market System (NMS) equities solution. This strategic move highlights the company's aim to advance in the capital markets industry.

data.title: Protolabs to reveal Q3 2025 results on Oct. 31, 2025, followed by conference call at 8:30am EDT. Dial 877-709-8150 to access.
data.description: Protolabs (NYSE: PRLB) based in Minneapolis has revealed the schedule for its financial report for the third quarter of 2025. The results will be disclosed before the market opens on Friday, Oct. 31, 2025. A conference call to delve into these results is set for 8:30 a.m. EDT on the same day. The call will also be webcasted live via a special link and the investor relations segment of the Protolabs website. Those who wish to join the live call can do so by dialing 877-709-8150 (or an international number).

data.title: Nihon Kohden to showcase advanced medical solutions at ASA's Anesthesiology Annual Meeting on Oct 10-14, 2025 in San Antonio. (#649)
data.description: A leading provider of patient monitoring and diagnostic systems, Nihon Kohden, with a strong presence in most of the top 50 U.S. hospitals and over 60 years of experience, is set to take part in the Anesthesiology Annual Meeting organized by the American Society of Anesthesiologists (ASA) from October 10 to 14, 2025, at the Henry B. Gonzalez Convention Center in San Antonio, TX. Interested individuals can drop by booth #649 to discover the company's newest integrated monitoring technologies.

data.title: Solana (NASDAQ:HSDT) selects BitGo as custodian for SOL treasury holdings, strengthening digital asset strategy.
data.description: Solana Company (NASDAQ:HSDT) in New York has revealed that they have chosen BitGo as their custodian for their SOL holdings. Formerly called Helius Medical Technologies, Inc., HSDT is focused on building their position in SOL, the native asset of the Solana Network. By teaming up with BitGo, a digital asset infrastructure company, they aim to further enhance their digital asset treasury strategy. This move showcases HSDT's dedication to their goals and signifies a significant step in their growth in the digital asset sector.

data.title: Saudi Arabia IT Services Market valued at USD 5.58 Billion in 2024, expected to reach USD 9.39 Billion by 2030, with a CAGR of 9.06%. Key players: Saudi Telecom Company, Etihad Etisalat, Zain, SAP, Oracle, Microsoft, IBM, and Alphabet.
data.description: A recent report on the Saudi Arabia IT Services Market, available on ResearchAndMarkets.com, indicates that the market was worth USD 5.58 billion in 2024. It is projected to grow to USD 9.39 billion by 2030, showing a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 9.06%. The market encompasses services like cloud computing, cybersecurity, data analytics, and software.

data.title: Chainlink's price may hit $25.40 by November 2025, with a 13% rally from $22.54, per technical analysis.
data.description: The current price prediction for Chainlink (LINK) indicates a positive trend with a target of $25.40 in the medium term. Based on current technical analysis, it is anticipated that Chainlink could see a 13% increase from its current level of $22.54 to reach this target.
KALSHI SAYS FUNDING ROUND LED BY SEQUOIA AND ANDREESSEN HOROWITZ

data.title: NYSE reports Alliance Laundry popping nearly 13% in debut. Pre-market insights, delivered by Kristen Scholer.
data.description: On October 10, 2025, in New York, the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) released its daily pre-market update from the NYSE Trading Floor. Investors can gain valuable market insights by accessing today's pre-market update before trading commences. Kristen Scholer presented the update on October 10th.

data.title: IonQ priced $2.0 billion equity offering with 16.5M shares at $93/share and 5.0M pre-funded warrants at October 9's stock price + 20%.
data.description: IonQ, a top quantum company, has disclosed the details of a significant financial move, unveiling the pricing of a $2.0 billion equity offering. This offering comprises 16,500,000 shares of IonQ’s common stock priced at $93 per share. Additionally, there are pre-funded warrants available to acquire 5,005,400 shares of IonQ’s common stock at $93 per warrant, indicating a 20% premium to IonQ’s closing stock price on October 9, 2025. Moreover, investors have the opportunity to obtain seven-year warrants to purchase an additional 43,010,800 shares of IonQ.

data.title: Mosaic's Phosphate division faces operational challenges, sales volumes at $1.6 million tons. Other segments show positive progress.
data.description: Shares of Mosaic Company (NYSE: MOS) experienced a notable drop in premarket trading on Friday following the release of preliminary segment volumes for the third quarter of fiscal 2025. Despite seeing positive sequential growth in other segments, the Phosphate division presented operational hurdles which led to the decrease. The Phosphate segment reported third-quarter sales volumes of $1.6 million tonnes, slightly lower than production levels due to shipment timing issues. Although Mosaic encountered delays in restoring Phosphate assets, it managed to briefly meet its target.

data.title: Saudi Arabia Automotive Battery Market projected to reach USD 5.79 Billion by 2030, growing at a CAGR of 10.60%.
data.description: In Dublin, a report titled "Saudi Arabia Automotive Battery Market, By Region, Competition, Forecast & Opportunities, 2020-2030F" has been introduced to ResearchAndMarkets.com. According to the report, the Saudi Arabia Automotive Battery Market had a value of USD 3.16 Billion in 2024 and it is projected to grow to USD 5.79 Billion by 2030, with a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 10.60%. This significant growth in the market is attributed to various factors, including the increasing number of vehicle owners.

data.title: Addiction Professionals of NC awarded Gold Bell Seal for Workplace Mental Health by MHA on World Mental Health Day.
data.description: In Raleigh, North Carolina, on October 10, 2025, Addiction Professionals of North Carolina (APNC) celebrated World Mental Health Day by proudly revealing their receipt of the Gold Bell Seal for Workplace Mental Health from Mental Health America (MHA). This prestigious award highlights the organization's commitment to promoting mental health in the workplace and serves as national recognition for their efforts.

data.title: PermitUsNow sponsors RHCA Luna Houston Awards Luncheon in 2025, championing business excellence in Texas.
data.description: On October 10, 2025, PermitUsNow, a prominent company specializing in permit expediting and consulting in Texas, sponsored the 2025 RHCA Luna Awards Houston Luncheon. The event was hosted by the Regional Hispanic Contractors Association (RHCA) and aimed to recognize and celebrate excellence in the construction industry. PermitUsNow's support underscored its commitment to the community and the construction sector.

data.title: InRetail Shopping Malls completes tender offer for 5.750% Senior Notes due 2028, reaching target amount.
data.description: In Perú, on October 10, 2025, a trust named "InRetail Shopping Malls," operating under D. Leg. No. 861 and unregistered in the SMV, is targeting institutional investors. The trust is managed by Internacional de Títulos Sociedad Titulizadora S.A. This development is significant as it pertains to a significant amount of funds managed by the trust for investment purposes, attracting the attention of institutional investors in the market.

data.title: Italian genomics triangle in Trieste, L'Aquila, Rome assembles new Diploid RPE-1 genome for CRISPR; published in California and Nature.
data.description: In Rome, a recent development saw the publication of a crucial reference genome by the USCS Genome Browser at the University of California, Santa Cruz. This new genome, named Diploid RPE-1, holds significant importance for centromere studies. The groundbreaking work behind this genome was achieved through collaboration between the Area Science Park in Trieste, the Giunta Lab at Sapienza University, Dante Labs, and the University of L'Aquila. These Italian institutions have joined forces with Rockefeller University in New York to form an international alliance, signaling a collaborative effort in the field of genomics.
